title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Program Brief: Python Assert Contracts
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python assert contracts increment in a tested data-report release candidate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use assertions for programmer invariants and tests rather than recoverable user validation.
Use named loggers, levels, structured context, handlers, and secret-safe messages without configuring libraries globally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
